source: City of Mukilteo Brand Guide v1.0 (2015-01-05)
note: No font files ship with this repo. Free substitutes are from Google Fonts under SIL OFL 1.1. See FONT-SUBSTITUTES.md and LICENSING.md.

display.use: Posters, feature type, big decorative headings with Tuscan/Western character. Also used in the logotype itself (already outlined in the vector files — don't retypeset).
display.note: No OFL substitute — the decorative Tuscan/Western category is not well represented in free font libraries. Rye was evaluated and rejected as too lightweight and generic. Use the licensed Rosewood Fill via Adobe CC, fall back to a heavy Bitter weight, or commission custom type for campaigns that actually need this character. See FONT-SUBSTITUTES.md for the full reasoning.

logo-caption.use: Text near the logo (sub-brand captions). Don't retypeset the logo itself — use the vector files.

web-safe-fallbacks.note: The brand guide explicitly sanctions these for on-screen use when the preferred fonts aren't available.
